name: Mock TTDC
description: Mock Trinidad & Tobago Digital Currency — a devnet test token issued by Limer's Capital for platform development, AMM liquidity testing, and integration with Solana DeFi primitives (Kamino, DFlow, Jupiter). Not a claim, promise, or representation of any relationship with the Central Bank of Trinidad & Tobago or any issued CBDC. Holds no monetary value. Cannot be redeemed. For testing only.
